landing.hero_tagline: Replacing agricultural debt with profit-sharing partnerships.
landing.hero_description: Harvverse is an AgriFintech platform that connects global investors with smallholder coffee producers through co-investment partnerships — not loans. The farmer keeps 60% of harvest profit. The partner receives 40%. No debt. No interest. No default.
landing.stat_price: Price achieved in specialty market · vs $2.50 commodity average.
landing.problem_no_credit: have no access to formal credit.
landing.problem_body: 500M smallholder farms globally lack capital. Every existing solution keeps them in debt — or locks them out entirely. 70% of farmer children abandon agriculture by age 25.
landing.model_invests: Invests $3K–$5K into a specific farm lot. No loan, no interest.
landing.model_farming_desc: Keeps farming as usual. Records milestones on-chain.
landing.model_body: A Phartmer (digital partner) co-invests $3K–$5K into a specific farm lot. No loan. No interest. Just shared profit at harvest — governed by smart contract.
landing.how_partner_desc: A Digital Partner co-invests $3,000–$5,000 for one harvest cycle.
landing.how_discover_desc: The farmer lists their coffee lot with verified production details.
landing.how_verify_desc: IoT sensors track farm activity and provide real-time updates.
landing.how_protect_desc: Funds are secured in a regulated trust and released by milestones.
landing.how_harvest_desc: Coffee is sold and profits are split: 60% farmer, 40% Digital Partner.
landing.how_body: Harvverse replaces traditional agricultural loans with a profit-sharing model where capital providers (Digital Partners) and coffee farmers share both the risk and the reward. If the harvest is good, everyone wins. If it's difficult, the loss is shared — no one carries debt.
landing.how_stack: Harvverse platform · smart contracts · IoT · HARVI marketplace · protocol layer
landing.why_body: Regulation, infrastructure, and market conditions have never aligned like this.
landing.why_reg_eudr_detail: — coffee traceability mandatory for EU import
landing.why_tech_defi_detail: shifting from speculation to real-world assets.
landing.economics_body: Platform fee 7–15% per investment. Marketplace commission 10% via HARVI. No inventory. Automated settlement.
landing.economics_series_a: Series A triggers at $500K+ ARR · 500+ active partnerships · 3-country footprint.
landing.award4_winner: Selected for the Endeavor × IICA AgTech Accelerator program
landing.award5_winner: Competitor in the EasyA Consensus Hackathon at Consensus Miami 2026
landing.ask_body: The proof that unlocks Series A. SAFE · $12M post-money cap · Delaware C-corp · 24-month runway. MVP operational today.
landing.contact_dp_q: Interested in becoming a Digital Partner?
landing.contact_investor_desc: Request access to our data room.
landing.blogs_subtitle: From stories to insights — everything Harvverse.
landing.blog3_title: What is a smart contract in agriculture?
landing.footer_copyright: © 2026 Harvverse Inc. A Delaware C-Corporation. All rights reserved.
